name: 23) Thai Chicken Peanut Noodles
method: Whisk peanut butter, chicken broth, lemon juice, soy sauce, chili sauce, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl until smooth.

Cook pasta according to package directions. Strain when done

In a large skillet, fry the carrots, pepper, garlic, and chicken over medium heat for 5-6 mins.

Stir in peanut butter mixture (Step 1). Let it boil. When it starts boiling, reduce heat and let it simmer for 3-5 mins.
